title: Abyssal Mooring Hull: team-member closeout — Director window discharged; session complete per owner direction; going dark
body:
**Team member closeout** — Abyssal Mooring Hull / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / c79a39

Owner-directed at 12:53Z: "end the monitor please, then run a session handoff, this session is complete." Following `session-handoff` SKILL Team Member (Not Closeout Owner) path — closeout owner for the team session is Incandescent Banking Flame (current Director from Moment 2 at 12:52:38Z).

- **Boundary owned**: Director role (PDR-064) for window 12:11Z → 12:53Z (~42 minutes). Authority absorbed from Seaworthy Navigating Beacon at 12:11Z (Moment 2 active-acknowledgement); discharged to Incandescent Banking Flame at 12:52:38Z (their Moment 2 active-acknowledgement). Outgoing Director residual closeout at 12:53Z (`fe621e83`'s sibling event).

- **Outcome**:
  - Authored Director role handoff record at `.agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/director-role-handoff-2026-05-23-abyssal-to-incandescent.md` (substrate-load-bearing; covers team roster + 7 in-flight routes + 5 worked instances + queued decisions + §10 highest-priority action).
  - Authority transferred cleanly via PDR-064 Two Moments (Moment 1 broadcast 12:49:45Z; Moment 2 broadcast by Incandescent 12:52:38Z).
  - 6 ticks of activity-assessment cron (`6e037273`, off-minute `2-59/5 * * * *`) run during Director window; CronDeleted at Moment 2 per cadence-boundary rule.
  - 7 substantive routings dispatched: Pearly (PR-108 push + verify; trigger-based), Incandescent (Monitor-cure, scope-expanded; handed to Twilit), Secret (Twilit-cure pre-stage review CLEAN + second-mega-commit failure-mode consolidation), Torrid (welcome + trigger-based bundle review), Clouded (Sonar PR-108 triage), Zephyrous (Twilit pair-support), Pearly (trigger update post-mega-push).
  - 1 architectural verdict issued (Seaworthy's `comms-watch-mechanism.md` Option A GO at 12:51:11Z; locked pre-Moment-2; inherited by Incandescent).
  - 2 owner corrections absorbed mid-cycle:
    - Idle-detection methodology refined from "≥5min since last comms-output" → "no current task requiring agent's action" (marshal-pending = work-idle).
    - Codex pool aggregate assessment when ≥3 simultaneously idle-with-individual-no-fit.

- **Evidence**:
  - Handoff record: `.agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/director-role-handoff-2026-05-23-abyssal-to-incandescent.md`
  - Moment 1: comms event at 12:49:45Z (`Coordinator pre-positioning: Abyssal Mooring Hull → Incandescent Banking Flame`)
  - Moment 2: Incandescent's broadcast at 12:52:38Z (`Coordinator role acknowledgement: Incandescent Banking Flame from Abyssal Mooring Hull`)
  - Tick narratives #1-#6 in comms stream
  - Verdict to Seaworthy: directed event `fe621e83` at 12:51:11Z

- **Claims / queue / git state**:
  - Claims under c79a39: NONE (verified via jq slurp; 0 entries).
  - Queue intents under c79a39 (non-abandoned): NONE.
  - Git: clean of source-class changes from my session. Working-tree residue is collab-state churn (napkin/pending-graduations/comms-seen/active-claims/shared-comms-log/reference doc — `.agent/reference/comms-watch-mechanism.md` modified by linter post Abyssal-authoring of the handoff record, intentional per system-reminder).
  - Cron: `6e037273` CronDeleted at Moment 2 per cadence-boundary rule.
  - Monitor: TaskStop'd at 12:53Z per owner direction.

- **Surprise or changed understanding**:
  1. PDR-064 protocol mechanics work cleanly under owner-directed mid-session role transfers — third Director-role transfer of the 2026-05-23 session executed in ~3 minutes (Incandescent's Moment 1 request at 12:47:59Z → Moment 2 at 12:52:38Z).
  2. Outgoing Director can productively issue verdicts during the Moment 1 window because routing authority remains with them until Moment 2 (e.g. Seaworthy doc verdict at 12:51:11Z, inherited by incoming Director).
  3. Director-cron methodology corrections happen via owner-flag, not by Director self-detection — same failure-mode shape as PDR-074 §observable-property-6 (Director-surface protection inversely enforced).
  4. Pool-aggregate routing (route the codex pool when ≥3 simultaneously idle-with-individual-no-fit) is a NEW criterion absent from current PDR-074 cluster; candidate refinement for incoming Director's consideration.

- **Blockers or risks**:
  - `.claude/rules/sha-prefix-in-collaboration-content.md` adapter still blocked by Claude self-modification policy for all Claude agents. Surfaced to owner at 12:32Z + 12:39Z. Awaiting owner verdict — surface forward to incoming Director's first tick.
  - HEAD `SHA:c6984bc6` type-check RED (Incandescent's mid-refactor in HEAD post owner-authorised `SHA:db275c09` mega-commit). Twilit completing structural cure clears it.
  - Sonar PR-108 gate ERROR (15 OPEN issues including 5 new S7786 from `watcher-heartbeat.ts`). Twilit's step 6 cures the 5 S7786; Clouded's triage routes the rest.

- **Handoff needed**:
  - All substance in the Director role handoff record. Incandescent has read it end-to-end per their Moment 2 broadcast.
  - No additional handoff steps from my side — closeout owner (Incandescent) inherits full Director surface.
  - Two worked instances in this session (idle-detection refinement + codex pool aggregate) are routed to Secret for napkin/pending-graduations capture (routing event `14b56fc7` at 12:44:35Z); Secret's marshal submission pending.

**Session complete.** Going dark from this broadcast.

Identity: Abyssal Mooring Hull / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / c79a39
